roadmap.goal: Bring Portfolio blocked surfaces to parity with Team (Epic 5074). One capture mechanism (new FeatureBlockedTransition entity, per-portfolio spells, ADR-102/103/104) plus two historic read paths closes nine parity rows. Slice 01 subtracts a live identity-collision defect; slice 02 adds capture + duration; slices 03/04 add historic count + drill-through; slice 05 re-adds demo backfill into the correct keyspace.

validation.note: Design settled: ADR-102/103/104 Accepted 2026-07-20; DISTILL 28 scenarios mapped 1:1 to slices. Roadmap authored inline from settled feature-delta; no open design decisions remain.

phases.name: Slice 01 — Stop demo backfill corrupting team blocked reads
phases.description: Withdraw the portfolio WorkItemBlockedTransition writes that write Feature.Id into the team keyspace; keep snapshot backfill. A live-correctness subtraction.

steps.name: Withdraw portfolio transition writes; keep snapshot backfill
criteria: Demo portfolio refresh writes no WorkItemBlockedTransition rows keyed by Feature.Id
No WorkItemBlockedTransition row references a non-existent WorkItem (repository invariant)
Portfolio blockedCountHistory trend still renders backdated snapshots
Team wip and drill-through at a past date exclude the colliding id
steps.implementation_notes: Remove only the portfolio-path transition writes (:79-94, :180-197 region); retain snapshotRepository writes so the trend survives (US-01 AC4). Snapshot backfill order must still land backdated snapshots even when the FK branch previously bit. Unskip the 5 Slice01 scenarios; regression-guard scenarios (trend renders) may already be green.

steps.name: Add FK-InMemory ci-learnings entry
criteria: docs/ci-learnings.md contains the EF-InMemory-does-not-enforce-FK rule (OQ-5 / UI-1)
steps.implementation_notes: Insert the ready entry from distill/upstream-issues.md UI-1 verbatim (adapt heading date). Docs-only; DES-exempt step — no TDD phases, append after 01-01 is green.

phases.name: Slice 02 — Capture feature blocked spells and surface duration
phases.description: New repository, FeatureDto per-portfolio routing refactor, events+handlers, capture seam and departure sweep on RefreshFeatures; blockedSince populated on wip. Highest-uncertainty slice.

steps.name: Portfolio-scoped FeatureBlockedTransition repository
criteria: IFeatureBlockedTransitionRepository defined with portfolio-scoped signatures
FeatureBlockedTransitionRepository over RepositoryBase<T> registered in DI
Repository open/close/query round-trips against real SQLite
steps.implementation_notes: Precursor commit (1). Entity + EF mapping + migration ALREADY exist (commit 4aa326d7). Every signature takes portfolioId — the unscoped WorkItemBlockedTransitionRepository:10/18/26 shape is the defect, not the pattern. Methods needed downstream: GetOpenSpell(portfolioId,featureId), GetBlockedTransitionsAt(portfolioId,date), GetFeatureIdsWithBlockedHistory(portfolioId,featureIds), GetBlockedFeatureIdsAt(portfolioId,date). Base class PortfolioBlockedHistoryAcceptanceTest already references the entity.

steps.name: Route FeatureDto blocked through IBlockedItemService
criteria: FeatureDto.cs:65-98 duplicate evaluator deleted; isBlocked/blockedSince are ctor args
5 build sites in 4 controllers supply the injected verdict
Scope-free sites use Any-projection: isBlocked=any open spell, blockedSince=MIN(EnteredAt)
Full backend suite green after refactor
steps.implementation_notes: Precursor commit (2) — SEPARATE refactor commit BEFORE behavioural commit (DDD-7 / repo rule). Delete FeatureIsBlocked, IsBlockedByPortfolioRuleSet, private RuleEvaluator<Feature>, FeatureFieldProvider. Build sites: PortfolioMetricsController:111/216/233 (already injects IBlockedItemService:24), TeamMetricsController:113, FeaturesController:97, DeliveryRulesController:58. Fallback if larger than expected: optional ctor params taking precedence, static fallback, deletion as follow-up — record explicitly if taken (ADR-103 §4). This is a pure refactor: behaviour identical until spells exist.

steps.name: FeatureBlocked events and capture/close handlers
criteria: FeatureBlocked(FeatureId,PortfolioId,Reason) and FeatureUnblocked(FeatureId,PortfolioId) records added
Capture handler opens one (feature,portfolio) spell; close handler closes it; idempotent
Handlers registered; a re-block opens a NEW spell not a reopen
steps.implementation_notes: Precursor commit (3a). Two distinct record types — NOT a generalised WorkItemBlocked (that would deliver feature ids to WorkItemBlockedTransitionCaptureHandler:26-31 and reproduce the collision at runtime, ADR-104 §2). Dispatcher swallows handler errors — assert on rows, never on absence-of-throw.

steps.name: Capture seam and departure sweep in RefreshFeatures
criteria: RefreshFeatures reads pre-update blocked verdict before Update() mutates (SyncedFeature record)
Edge detection in the post-Save second pass publishes FeatureBlocked/Unblocked; departure sweep closes absent-feature spells, skipped on empty refresh
wip live read returns non-null blockedSince from the open spell EnteredAt (per-portfolio), no frontend/portfolio branch
First-observation feature raises no edge (— preserved, US-02 AC4)
All 5 Slice02 scenarios green through the wip driving port
steps.implementation_notes: MERGED 02-04+02-05 (seam + wip read) so scenarios green end-to-end through the wip driving port (outside-in/port-to-port). Hoist the ReferenceId lookup out of AddOrUpdateFeature (:530) into RefreshFeatures (:485); SyncedFeature twins SyncedItem (:197). Edge detection in the second pass after featureRepository.Save() (:496-501) because feature.Id is 0 until saved. Events publish before PortfolioUpdater:73 raises PortfolioFeaturesRefreshed so spells land before the snapshot. Sweep mirrors RefreshWorkItems:83-87. Per-portfolio keying (ADR-103). OQ-1: parent features NOT in eligible set. wip live branch reads blockedSince from GetOpenSpellsForPortfolio; no frontend change (BaseMetricsView consumes blockedSince, C4/D11). ALSO root-cause the PortfolioTeam double-link the 02-02 crafter flagged (GivenASharedFeature multi-portfolio+team → UNIQUE constraint): decide fixture-seed bug vs real production double-link in RefreshFeatures/Portfolio.GetTeams and fix; then un-Ignore the scope-free guard 02-02 deferred.

phases.name: Slice 03 — Honest blocked count on a historic portfolio range
phases.description: Add the historic branch to wip gated by asOfDate<today, mirroring TeamMetricsController:130-156 with indexed-lookup discipline. Retire the docs caveat.

steps.name: Historic branch on portfolio wip read
criteria: asOfDate.Date<UtcNow.Date routes to reconstruction; today/future answer live
openSpellByFeature Dictionary + idsWithBlockedHistory HashSet (no per-item scan, O(n))
Feature blocked in a past window but clear today reads blocked for that window
Feature blocked only today reads not blocked on a range closing before its spell
No-history feature falls back to live rule; history-no-covering-spell reads not blocked
steps.implementation_notes: Mirror TeamMetricsController:130-156 exactly incl. indexed-lookup (commit 1d4dcb5a — dictionary/hashset, never linear Contains/FirstOrDefault → O(n²)). Repository signatures all take portfolioId. US-03 AC4: absence of a spell is evidence, not a gap. Parity property test asserts team≡portfolio over same range.

steps.name: Remove obsolete portfolio blocked-history docs caveat
criteria: docs/metrics/widgets.md no longer contains the portfolio blocked-history-not-recorded caveat (line ~106)
Blocked Overview section describes Team and Portfolio identically
steps.implementation_notes: D6 — removed in the slice that makes it untrue, not deferred to /release. Docs-only DES-exempt step. Per feedback_docs_wait_for_confirmation: ship code first, confirm with user before doc prose update.

phases.name: Slice 04 — Drill into a past portfolio blocked bar
phases.description: Replace the live-only blockedItemsAtDate stub with portfolio-scoped reconstruction; call the existing reconciliation guard.

steps.name: Reconstruct portfolio blockedItemsAtDate from capture
criteria: Past date returns features whose blocked interval covers that date (reconstructed)
Latest/today bar keeps the live IsBlocked branch
Pre-capture date returns the reconstructable set plus completeness note
ReconcileReconstructedCountWithSnapshot is called and logs divergence
A departed feature does not appear even on dates inside its spell
steps.implementation_notes: GetBlockedFeatureIdsAt(portfolioId,date) → intersect with the portfolio's features → WorkItemDto. Live branch untouched (:490-496, US-04 AC2). Call ReconcileReconstructedCountWithSnapshot (:513, already portfolio-parameterised). Delete the obsolete 'reconstruction is impossible for portfolios' comment (:498-500, US-04 AC5). blockedSince=null in drill-through (OQ-3 parity-as-is). Straight mirror of TeamMetricsController:512.

phases.name: Slice 05 — Demo portfolio blocked history
phases.description: Re-add (correctly) what slice 01 withdrew: backdated feature blocked spells into the feature keyspace via the new repository. Demo-gated, idempotent, StartedDate-capped.

steps.name: Backfill feature-keyspace spells for demo portfolios
criteria: Backdated spells synthesized into the feature keyspace, never the team keyspace (US-01 invariant holds)
Demo-gated via SynthesizeStateJourneyForDemo and idempotent across repeats
No backdated spell predates the feature StartedDate
A non-demo portfolio gains no backdated spells
Freshly loaded demo: a past bar drills into a non-empty dialog, a feature shows blocked Nd>0
steps.implementation_notes: Write into IFeatureBlockedTransitionRepository (feature keyspace), NOT WorkItemBlockedTransition. Preserve SpreadEnteredDates + StartedDate cap. Snapshot backfill unchanged. Idempotent (skip if spells exist). Keyed (FeatureId,PortfolioId) per ADR-103.
